content: PO workflow mistakes: manual data entry causing price transpositions and duplicate orders, lack of standardized PO templates causing cross-team inconsistency, approval bottlenecks where POs sit idle delaying fulfillment, missing supplier communication channels leading to unshipped orders, no end-to-end visibility creating reactive (crisis-driven) procurement, and scattered institutional knowledge living only in staff heads. Prevention: enforce single centralized PO system, standardize templates, automate status tracking, and implement role-based access to shared data.
